basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Technical Support and Project Technician Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support and Project Technician

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for all posts. Age is relaxable for meritorious, well-qualified and experienced candidates who have worked in Govt/Autonomous set up and having relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th pass with Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT/DMLT), 12th pass with Diploma in Computer Applications/Computer Science/Information Technology (DCA/ADCA), 10th (Science) with one year experience in related field
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-II: 12th pass with Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT/DMLT) from a recognized institution with relevant experience OR 12th pass with Diploma in Computer Applications/Computer Science/Information Technology (DCA/ADCA or equivalent) from a recognized institution with at least one year of experience in data management, patient record maintenance, project documentation, and database handling in related field. Desirable: Experience in Cytogenetics Laboratory or other research laboratories. Experience in sample tracking, laboratory data management, maintenance of patient records, and coordination of multicentric research projects. Proficiency in MS Office, MS Excel, statistical software, data compilation, and report preparation. Project Technician-I: 10th (Science) with one year experience in related field. Desirable: Diploma (MLT/DMLT) with experience in Cytogenetics Laboratory and/or relevant field as per the scope of the project.

salary_details.details: Project Technical Support and Project Technician: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA (20%) Project Technician-I: Rs. 18,000/- + HRA (18%)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bhu.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BHU recruitment is 22-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Technical Support-II and Project Technician-I posts in this BHU recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support-II, candidates need to have passed 12th with a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT/DMLT) or a Diploma in Computer Applications/Computer Science/Information Technology (DCA/ADCA) with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in this BHU recruitment is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this BHU recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these BHU posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the BHU recruitment includes a written examination, personal discussion, and an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for Project Technician-I?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Technician-I post is Rs. 18,000/- plus HRA (18%).

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job at BHU?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these positions at Banaras Hindu University is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of BHU, www.bhu.ac.in. Direct links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, at Banaras Hindu University.
